original: This pair of panties less resembles a garment than an artful arrangement of black threads designed to resemble a spider’s web. Between them in a gauzy, transparent fabric that holds it all together while simultaneously flashing hints of tantalizing skin. Modesty is still protected by a well-placed tangle of threads, but only barely.
